What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Two people wearing swim caps and swimwear float and swim in a pool with blue water where black lane lines run parallel along the light blue tiled floor. Circular dark markers attach to the far pool wall above the water line while palm trees and a white building appear behind a chain-link fence in the background. A red banner displays text near the building structure.
